verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why have You chosen me Out of millions Your child to be You know all the wrongs that I've done Oh, how could You pardon me To forgive my iniquity, to save me You gave Jesus Your Son

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But Lord help me be What You want me to be Your Word I will strive to obey My life I now give For You I will live And walk by Your side All the way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am amazed to know that our God, So great, could love me so Is willing and wanting to bless His love is so wonderful His mercy so bountiful I can't understand it, I confess
